attributes.description: Broker process health, capacity headroom, JVM, and GC.

query.esql:
TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_pct = AVG(activemq.memory.utilization) * 100 BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_pct = AVG(activemq.memory.utilization) * 100 BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.store.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS store_pct = AVG(activemq.store.utilization) * 100 BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.store.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS store_pct = AVG(activemq.store.utilization) * 100 BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.disk.store_usage IS NOT NULL OR activemq.disk.temp_usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS store_pct = AVG(activemq.disk.store_usage), temp_pct = AVG(activemq.disk.temp_usage) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.disk.store_usage IS NOT NULL OR activemq.disk.temp_usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS store_pct = AVG(activemq.disk.store_usage), temp_pct = AVG(activemq.disk.temp_usage) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.queue.blocked.sends IS NOT NULL
| STATS blocked_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.queue.blocked.sends)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.queue.blocked.sends IS NOT NULL
| STATS blocked_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.queue.blocked.sends)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.jvm.memory.heap.used IS NOT NULL OR activemq.jvm.memory.heap.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS heap_used = AVG(activemq.jvm.memory.heap.used), heap_max = AVG(activemq.jvm.memory.heap.max) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.jvm.memory.heap.used IS NOT NULL OR activemq.jvm.memory.heap.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS heap_used = AVG(activemq.jvm.memory.heap.used), heap_max = AVG(activemq.jvm.memory.heap.max) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: JVM Heap Used vs Max Over Time

query.esql:
TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.jvm.cpu.process.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_pct = AVG(activemq.jvm.cpu.process.usage) * 100 BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.jvm.cpu.process.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_pct = AVG(activemq.jvm.cpu.process.usage) * 100 BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.jvm.thread.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS threads = AVG(activemq.jvm.thread.count) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.jvm.thread.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS threads = AVG(activemq.jvm.thread.count) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.jvm.gc.collections IS NOT NULL
| STATS gc_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.jvm.gc.collections)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), gc.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.jvm.gc.collections IS NOT NULL
| STATS gc_rate = SUM(RATE(activemq.jvm.gc.collections)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), gc.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.jvm.file_descriptor.open IS NOT NULL OR activemq.jvm.file_descriptor.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS fd_open = AVG(activemq.jvm.file_descriptor.open), fd_max = AVG(activemq.jvm.file_descriptor.max) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.jvm.file_descriptor.open IS NOT NULL OR activemq.jvm.file_descriptor.max IS NOT NULL
| STATS fd_open = AVG(activemq.jvm.file_descriptor.open), fd_max = AVG(activemq.jvm.file_descriptor.max) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.memory.limit IS NOT NULL OR activemq.store.limit IS NOT NULL OR activemq.temp.limit IS NOT NULL
| EVAL broker = COALESCE(activemq.broker.name, resource.attributes.activemq.broker.name)
| STATS memory_limit = MAX(activemq.memory.limit), store_limit = MAX(activemq.store.limit), temp_limit = MAX(activemq.temp.limit) BY broker
| SORT broker ASC

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.memory.limit IS NOT NULL OR activemq.store.limit IS NOT NULL OR activemq.temp.limit IS NOT NULL
| EVAL broker = COALESCE(activemq.broker.name, resource.attributes.activemq.broker.name)
| STATS memory_limit = MAX(activemq.memory.limit), store_limit = MAX(activemq.store.limit), temp_limit = MAX(activemq.temp.limit) BY broker
| SORT broker ASC

attributes.title: Memory, Store, and Temp Limits by Broker

query.esql:
FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_pct = AVG(activemq.memory.utilization) * 100

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.memory.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_pct = AVG(activemq.memory.utilization) * 100

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.temp.limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS temp_limit = MAX(activemq.temp.limit)

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.temp.limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS temp_limit = MAX(activemq.temp.limit)

params.markdown:
## [ActiveMQ OTel] Broker Health & Capacity

Deep-dive into broker process health and capacity:
- Memory, store, and temp utilization
- Usage vs limits (gauge)
- Disk store & temp usage
- Blocked sends rate
- JVM heap, CPU, threads, GC, file descriptors

query.esql:
FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.store.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS store_pct = AVG(activemq.store.utilization) * 100

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.store.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS store_pct = AVG(activemq.store.utilization) * 100

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.store.limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS store_limit = MAX(activemq.store.limit)

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.store.limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS store_limit = MAX(activemq.store.limit)

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.temp.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS temp_pct = AVG(activemq.temp.utilization) * 100

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.temp.utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS temp_pct = AVG(activemq.temp.utilization) * 100

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.memory.usage IS NOT NULL AND activemq.memory.limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(activemq.memory.usage), limit = MAX(activemq.memory.limit)

FROM metrics-activemq.otel-*
| WHERE activemq.memory.usage IS NOT NULL AND activemq.memory.limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS usage = MAX(activemq.memory.usage), limit = MAX(activemq.memory.limit)

attributes.title: [ActiveMQ OTel] Broker Health & Capacity
